title: Web cloud pilot readiness plan

cohort.target_learners: Arabic-speaking adult English learners using the A1 pilot curriculum

required_backend_endpoints.name: List lessons
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Load the active A1 pilot lesson queue for a signed-in student.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Get lesson
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Load one lesson with its quiz questions and content metadata.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Start session
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Create a web session identifier and return the lesson questions.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Submit attempts
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Record answers and return the full AIM adaptive result.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Get adaptive result
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Reload the latest stored AIM result for a completed web session.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Get recommendation
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Show AIM's next educational action on the student dashboard.

required_backend_endpoints.name: Admin overview
required_backend_endpoints.purpose: Monitor pilot students, sessions, mastery movement, recommendations, outcomes, and audit events.

schedule.objective: Capture the baseline A1 score before lesson practice starts.
Practice greetings and introductions with supported A1 questions.
Practice the verb to be in simple personal sentences.
Practice numbers and colors with direct recognition tasks.
Practice family vocabulary and simple descriptive sentences.
Practice daily routine verbs in short present simple statements.
Continue daily routine practice and collect stable adaptive evidence.
Practice present simple question forms with do and does.
Practice home and city vocabulary in familiar A1 contexts.
Practice basic reading comprehension using short English texts.
Review mixed A1 skills before the final measurement.
Measure learning gain after completing the two-week pilot sequence.

measurement.primary_metric: Pre-test to post-test score gain using the shared A1 assessment.
measurement.recommendation_effectiveness_rule: A recommendation is counted as effective when the next completed session shows a positive mastery or retention movement without a stronger weakness signal.
measurement.mastery_safety_rule: Mastery must be calculated only from accuracy, consistency, retention, difficulty performance, evidence quality, penalties, reliability, and session caps.

operator_checklist: Create exactly five pilot student accounts in Supabase Auth.
Link each auth user to one backend student profile.
Confirm lesson and assessment JSON validation passes before the first session.
Confirm the React web pilot can load lessons, start sessions, submit attempts, and show adaptive results.
Confirm the admin dashboard loads students, sessions, recommendations, outcomes, and audit events.
Run the pre-test before L01 and the post-test after L10.
Review admin dashboard data after each pilot day and record only educational observations.
Do not increase difficulty unless AIM's safety gates and decision conflict resolver allow it.
